name: Midway Gold Corp.
description: Midway Gold Corp. was a precious metals exploration and development company focused on the acquisition and advancement of gold and silver mineral properties in North America, particularly in Nevada. The company aimed to explore, design, build, and operate gold mines while providing returns to shareholders. Its primary operations included the Pan Gold mine and various exploration projects such as Spring Valley and Gold Rock. Following financial difficulties and the suspension of operations at its primary mine, the company filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy in 2015 and subsequently ceased business operations.
